zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Standish於大約1346年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Ralph de Standish30歲，母親Mary De Ince30歲。他於1370年與Mrs John Standish在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1410年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Standish于大约1346年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Ralph de Standish30岁，母亲Mary De Ince30岁。他于1370年与Mrs John Standish在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1410年之后。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John De Standish was born about 1346, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Standish, was 30 and his mother, Mary De Ince, was 30. He married Mrs John Standish in 1370, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1410.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Standish est né environ 1346, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Standish, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary De Ince, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mrs John Standish en 1370, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1410.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Standish um 1346 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Standish 30 und seine Mutter Mary De Ince 30. Er hat 1370 in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Mrs John Standish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1410.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Standish è nato il circa 1346 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Standish, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mary De Ince, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mrs John Standish nel 1370, nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1410.

ko.lifeSummary: John De Standish(이)가 대략 1346년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Standish(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary De Ince(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오스커크에서 Mrs John Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Standish родился около 1346 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Standish было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary De Ince, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs John Standish в 1370 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1410 г.
